headings.tracking: tracking-tight for large headings, tracking-[0.2em] for overlines and small labels
headings.style: Use contrasting weights (e.g. font-light for main title, font-bold for small accents) to make Open Sans feel premium.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-12, p-24, py-32) to create breathing room indicative of luxury real estate.
layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Use bento-style asymmetrical grids where possible. For 2-column layouts, use col-span-5 and col-span-7 rather than equal halves.

surface_styles.glassmorphism: For Sticky Navbar: bg-[#1E1E1E]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#D4A76A]/20.
surface_styles.cards: Flat background (#282828), 1px subtle gold border, no generic shadows. On hover, slight lift (-translate-y-1) and a subtle gold glow.

visual_enhancers.textures: Add a subtle grain/noise overlay to the dark background to prevent it from feeling like flat digital space.
visual_enhancers.borders: Use 1px solid strokes of rgba(212, 167, 106, 0.2) or 0.3 to divide sections instead of heavy shadows.

components.navbar: Sticky, glassmorphism, right-aligned links. Hamburger menu for mobile. CTA Button with gold background (#D4A76A) and dark text (#1E1E1E).
components.hero: Full-bleed background image with heavy dark gradient overlay (bg-black/60 to bg-[#1E1E1E] at bottom). Massive headings. Primary CTA and Secondary outlined CTA.
components.about_legacy: Asymmetrical 2-column. Left: Professional portrait/legacy image (max-h-[80vh] object-cover). Right: Text timeline with wide spacing.
components.signature_developments: Carousel layout (using embla-carousel or shadcn). Cards with #282828 background, large images, elegant typography, 'View Project' link in gold.
components.our_vision: Background image of abstract dark gold architecture with overlay. 3-column pillars (grid md:grid-cols-3). Cards hover over background.
components.our_impact: 4-column stats grid. Numbers must animate on scroll (use framer-motion or react-countup). Numbers in large font, colored #D4A76A.
components.testimonials: Slider. Dark cards with subtle border. Quotation marks in massive font-light as a watermarked background element.
components.cta_banner: High contrast. Gold background (#D4A76A) with dark text (#1E1E1E), or Dark background with prominent gold border.
components.contact_form: Shadcn Form elements heavily customized. Dark inputs (bg-transparent border-b border-[#D4A76A]/40 focus:border-[#D4A76A] outline-none). Validation required. console.log on submit.
components.footer: 4 columns. Massive 'Gopal Charan' text or logo at the bottom. Minimalist links. Include contact info: +91 96381 88188, gcindhub@yahoo.com, Ahmedabad.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Use Lenis for premium smooth momentum scrolling.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up animations for grid items using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Interactive elements must have clear hover states. Buttons: scale-105 or subtle brightness increase. Links: gold underline expanding from center.

hero_background.description: Very tall luxury commercial building lit up at night.

legacy_portrait.description: Professional man in collared shirt, representing the founder/legacy.

portfolio_1.description: Spacious empty modern industrial warehouse interior.

portfolio_2.description: Modern industrial building with large garage door.

portfolio_3.description: Modern industrial warehouse building under clear blue sky.

vision_background.description: Abstract dark room with yellow/gold light.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure react-router-dom for 4 pages: Home, About, Services/Projects, Contact.
Home page should be a single scrolling landing page containing all sections.
Other pages (About, Services, Contact) should reuse their respective sections from the homepage, wrapped with the Layout (Navbar + Footer).
Install @phosphor-icons/react for premium, thin, luxury icons.
Install framer-motion for page transitions and scroll-triggered animations.
Ensure the Open Sans font is loaded via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
Do NOT use pure #000000. Use the defined #1E1E1E and #282828.
All text over images MUST have sufficient contrast. Use heavy overlays (bg-black/60) or text-shadow.
Contact form must only log to console as requested: 'Don't create any backend for Contact form, keep console.log for now.'
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
